reviews.review_description: I wont recommend to people with a small play space. it forces you to reach far. I could not play because it made me reach out of my guardian and i cant.

reviews.review_title: I... I really don't get this?
reviews.review_description:
The demo starts, you pick up a gun, you shoot someone, then you get put in an empy room in front of a red person and there's nothing you can do... What?

Is this demo really only 15 seconds long?
For new users, this should be enough of a demo to see what they are selling, which is the same thing they've been selling on every other vr store without adding any extra levels.

Very fun game.
The demo is short but it really sells the game.
Title is accurate, very hot.
Literally the first VR game I ever played that made me fall in love with VR. 5/5 for the demo and full game. Just a must play, really is a good invitation to the mechanics of VR vs console games.
demo is bugged. you can only do a single shot.

I bought this after reading all the rave reviews. I was expecting a dynamic shooter - requiring fast reactions and aiming skills. The game is actually closer to a puzzle game where you are required to 'unlock' each level by carrying out a series of actions in a prescribed order. The process is more akin to lock picking rather than out and out enemy blasting.  I found the process unrewarding and uncreative and couldn't imagine myself replaying the levels as their 'on rails' nature left me feeling a tad unfulfilled.

It doesn't mean it might not be for you though.  :)

reviews.review_title: The training levels from the game
reviews.review_description: Great fun and introduction to VR. The training levels from the game set you up with the skills you need.
First timer in 6DOF VR. This is crazy. This is the future of gaming. This game is really cool, I like it very much. Will buy the full version.

reviews.review_title: 15 min Demo is enough to sell the game
reviews.review_description:
This has the best tracking I have tried in any VR game. It never lags and works perfectly.

The gameplay although simple and is extremely unique. This just a Demo, just try it.
This is a long and fantastic demo! By the end of it you can easily tell if you want the full game or not because you get a perfect slice of the cake to start with
really fun demo im considering on buying the full game next christmas :)
how do I download it
Great demo, inspired to purchase the full game afterwards!

why can you not move through the area with a thumbstick like on consoles? I really do not get this, the idea of moving around freely in the room is great, but in reality most people do not have the required space. So why can I not use the thumbstick like in other games?

This is really the one thing that keeps me from buying the game.

I'm trying the demo. It's OK.
But it's not so funny neither so challenging.
Interesting the way the game was concepted.
Just give a shot to it!
it's just a good game!
This Is So Far My Most Favorite Oculus Experieces!
